name: Log Extractor
description: Extract cookies from logs quickly and cleanly.
long_description:
🔧 **LOG EXTRACTOR (Cookies Only)**

• Quickly parses log files and extracts usable cookies.
• Automatically skips corrupt/invalid lines.
• No network required — fully proxyless.
• Fast, stable, optimized performance.

💰 **Pricing:**
- 1 Day: $0.5
- 1 Month: $2
- Lifetime (No Update): $5
- Lifetime (With Updates): $8
- Source Code: $10

🔁 *Includes speed improvements & UI tweaks.*
